pattern: Split on single spaces, reverse each token independently, and rejoin; word order and spacing are preserved while characters within each word flip.
hints: The whitespace layout and the order of the words stay exactly the same; only the letters inside each word change.
Break the sentence into words on each space, then reverse every word on its own.
Join the individually reversed words back with single spaces to rebuild the sentence.

stress.description: random words of varying length joined by single spaces
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    words = rng.randint(1, max(1, size // 8))
    parts = []
    for _ in range(words):
        wlen = rng.randint(1, 12)
        parts.append(''.join(rng.choice(string.ascii_letters + string.digits) for _ in range(wlen)))
    return [' '.join(parts)]
stress.note: no leading or trailing spaces, single-space separators
